3078860.name: All On Board! - Terraforming Mars
3078860.description:
Get this DLC to host Terraforming Mars sessions in All On Board!

All players need All On Board! to participate, but only the host must own this DLC, letting others join without having to buy it.

1-5 Players | 120 mins

Recommended Age: 12+

Lead your corporation in the ambitious race to terraform Mars, now adapted for VR in All On Board!

Spend resources and deploy advanced technology to raise the temperature, create oceans, and build a breathable atmosphere on the Red Planet. As Mars transforms, waves of settlers will arrive, and only the most visionary corporation will thrive.

Each turn brings new opportunities, whether launching satellites, inventing breakthroughs, or triggering unique abilities tied to your cards. Manage money, energy, and heat to outmaneuver rivals. Every game unfolds with new challenges, strategies, and surprises.

Key Features:

- Strategic depth: plan ahead and compete for resources and milestones

- Over 200 project cards: endless abilities and combinations

- Dynamic gameplay: balance short-term actions with long-term goals

- Solo mode or multiplayer: play alone or with up to 4 others

- Endless replayability: with randomized cards and unpredictable outcomes, no two games ever play the same

- Includes a themed scenario and dedicated soundtrack

- Available in EFIGS (English, French, Italian, German and Spanish)

- Quick learning with a rulebook and video tutorial

Will your corporation lead humanity into a new era?
3078860.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语
